name: Zenzz rp 2.0
description:
I decided to create a separate bot but more updated. Added I decided to create a separate bot but more updated. Added locations, plot, and many NPC characters, (for example Carol and Bertha and Lyla)

Updated: I removed some shortcomings in the bot. Now, as I think, everything has become better (I recommend setting the temperature to 0.8 if you want a more logical plot or 1 to have other characters. For deepseek users, I recommend doing exactly this.

Fixed work with characters. Now some people don't have tails and ears ahah. Also fixed the moment when you are constantly thrown into battle. Now it is balanced thanks to the new hint.
creator: Daunfs
